title: creusa deltoidea
intro: Creusa deltoidea, also known as the Sensitive Plant, is a perennial shrub native to Central and South America, characterized by its compound leaves that fold up when touched or disturbed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Creusa deltoidea include pain relief, wound healing, and the reduction of inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin irritations, minor wounds, and other health concerns.
